Event: The Hunting Adventure
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E7
Source of Power Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage equal to 1% / 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 7% / 10% of own max health to all enemies in a small radius around the unit.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage equal to 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 10% / 12% / 15% of their max health to all enemies in a large radius around the unit.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage equal to 8% / 9% / 10% / 11% / 13% / 16% / 20% of their max health to all enemies in a large radius around the unit and restores health equal to 1% / 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 7% / 10% of the damage dealt to themself and all allies.
